GCF
Main Navigation GuideReferenceBenchmarksPlayground

Appearance

GCFGraph Compact Format

Token-optimized wire format for structured LLM tool responses. 84% fewer tokens than JSON, 34% fewer than TOON. Encodes any data, not just graphs.

Get Started
View Benchmarks
GitHub

79% fewer tokens than JSON

Positional fields, local IDs, and hierarchical grouping eliminate per-record overhead. Savings grow with payload size.

34% fewer tokens than TOON

Tested on TOON's own benchmark with their datasets and tokenizer. GCF wins on mixed-structure, flat, and semi-uniform data.

100% LLM comprehension

At 500 symbols, JSON scores 66.7% on structured extraction (it miscounts). GCF scores 100% at the lowest token cost.

Gets cheaper over time

Session deduplication (92.7% savings by 5th call) and delta encoding (81.2% savings on re-queries). No other format has these.

Zero dependencies

Go, TypeScript, and Python implementations. Each is a single package with no runtime dependencies.

Designed for MCP

Built for Model Context Protocol tool responses. Any MCP server returning structured data can use GCF.
